docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO: BUILDING MANAGE MENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KAID, AMMAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2011 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-22-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES HAVE REACHED AGREEMENT AS TO INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS AS FOLLOWS: STARTING OCTOBER 5-10, 2011 - $250.00, $200.00 PER MONTH EACH MONTH UNTIL FEBRUARY 2012. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC) AND DEFENDANT(JD) WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-02-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE MITCHELLS E-MAIL REQUESTED THAT NO CASES BE SCHEDULED FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION FOR 3/26/12. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT IS PAYING MONTHLY INSTALLMENT OF $200.00 UNTIL FEBRUARY. IF NO APPEARANCE CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER PROGRESS REPORT THEN DISCHARGE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED. (506)
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2011 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-23-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT IS PAYING MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $200.00 PER MONTH, NEXT PAYMENT DUE FEBRUARY 2012, AS AGREEMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT KAID, AMMAR ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED-ATTEMPTED NO KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD.
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADMAN, ABDULSALAM
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,590.00 FILED BY RADMAN, ABDULSALAM AS TO DEFENDANT KAID, AMMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADMAN, ABDULSALAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAID, AMMAR $1,314.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,399.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED 12/22/11 TO AMMAR KAID

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR LAST PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-26-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING, CASE TO BE DISCHARGED AS STATED IN THE PREVIOUS PROGRESS OF 1/23/12. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KAID, AMMAR
